mildItems.name: Four-leaf clover
mildItems.description: Gives +5% crit chance. (A crit does x3 damage).

mildItems.name: Sword
mildItems.description: Swings in an area forward dealing damage.

mildItems.name: Slingshot
mildItems.description: Fire a small and weak projectile forwards.

mildItems.name: Lightbulb
mildItems.description: Shining projectile that deals no damage.

mildItems.name: Fly swatter
mildItems.description: Whacks above the opponent stunning them briefly, makes a funny sound.

matureItems.name: Saboteur
matureItems.description: Pick another player. They get -1 in a random stat.

matureItems.name: Rat bomb
matureItems.description: Passes between players and will blow up after  a set amount of time.

matureItems.name: Rat poison
matureItems.description: Poison target rat who slowly loses health.

matureItems.name: Shield
matureItems.description: Protects the rat from attacks from the front.

matureItems.name: Cannablistic urges
matureItems.description: Heal a quarter heart for every hit.

matureItems.name: Olive oil
matureItems.description: Chance to trigger a trap without being harmed.

matureItems.name: Video game reference
matureItems.description: Spawns two pipes next to different traps that you can teleport between.

matureItems.name: Pied Piper’s pipe
matureItems.description: When played, rats move towards each other.

stinkyItems.name: Neural whip
stinkyItems.description: Any player you hit with it, will be given the same debuffs as you for the rest of that round.

stinkyItems.name: Thievery
stinkyItems.description: When this item is selected, you randomly gain an item held by another player.

stinkyItems.name: Double-edged sword
stinkyItems.description: Deal double damage. Take 1 damage each time you attack.

stinkyItems.name: Hollow Cheese
stinkyItems.description: Shoots one big ball that moves very slowly but if it touches someone it does major damage.

stinkyItems.name: Overclocked pacemaker
stinkyItems.description: Increase all stats by 3. Every 5 seconds there is a 1/1000 chance that you immediately die.

stinkyItems.name: Berserker’s helmet
stinkyItems.description: Each time you take damage this round, your attack raises by 1 for the rest of the round.

stinkyItems.name: Bad signal
stinkyItems.description: For the rest of the round the screen is obscured with TV static.

stinkyItems.name: Teleporter
stinkyItems.description: Swap the positions of all the rats.

blueItems.name: Gun
blueItems.description: Fires a super fast projectile that instakills.

blueItems.name: Giant dentures
blueItems.description: Let’s you eat (insta-kill) any rat that gets within range.

blueItems.name: Big nuclear bomb that kills everyone
blueItems.description: Big nuclear bomb that kills everyone.

blueItems.name: Stopwatch
blueItems.description: The timer immediately ends, moving straight to the quiz section.

negativeItems.name: Zero-leaf clover
negativeItems.description: Gives -5% crit chance. (A crit does x3 damage).
